title: E-commerce API Documentation
description: Dynamic E-Commerce workflow management system featuring order processing, real-time inventory updates, secure authentication and automated reporting. Backend APIs documented using Postman.

title: Course Booking API Documentation
description: RESTful API for managing course enrollments, authentication, CRUD operations, archiving and student management. Publicly documented using Postman.

title: Course Booking App
description: A MERN stack course enrollment system featuring secure authentication, role-based access control, course browsing, enrollment, and profile management.

title: E-commerce App
description: MERN E-Commerce Platform featuring dynamic product catalog with filtering and sorting, real-time search, seamless cart updates, secure checkout and a comprehensive admin dashboard.

title: Airline Booking System Mockup
description: Side Project: Conceptual design showcasing an intuitive UI for flight search, seat selection, and booking confirmation, focusing on user experience and workflow efficiency.

title: Airline Booking System Prototype
description: Side Project: Interactive prototype simulating end-to-end airline booking functionalities, including flight search, reservation, payment processing and real-time ticket management.

title: Short Courses Capstone
description: Side Project: A capstone project showcasing course management and enrollment features built during training.
